title: Ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 3.3, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: Ollama Python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama. Run large language models locally with a simple Python API.

title: Ollama JS / TypeScript
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama. Works in Node, Bun, Deno, and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama models. Use any Ollama model as a LangChain LLM or embeddings provider.

title: ollama-webui
summary: ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama. Features model management, code highlighting, multimodal chat, and more.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama. Simple, idiomatic API for generating chat, embeddings, and model management.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust client library for the Ollama API. Type-safe, async, and supports all Ollama endpoints.

title: Ollama on npm
summary: Official npm package for Ollama. JavaScript/TypeScript client to run LLMs locally.

title: ollama on PyPI
summary: Official PyPI package for Ollama. Python client to chat with local LLMs.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Next.js chat interface for Ollama with TailwindCSS and streaming support.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app for Ollama with session memory and model switching.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG pipeline using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain for PDF Q&A.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets users chat with any Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-n8n
summary: n8n community node to integrate Ollama models into no-code workflows.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and model init jobs.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker images and compose files for CPU & GPU inference.
